evals.prompt: You are the data-modelling-agent. For ticket PROJ-102 (FEATURE/P3 — Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS), model the data into data vault and/or dimensional modelling. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-102.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: data-modelling-agent correctly model the data into data vault and/or dimensional modelling for PROJ-102, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Assesses the dimensional-model impact of the new SETTLEMENT_DATE column on FCT_TRADES
States whether the grain of FCT_TRADES changes (it does not)
Makes no changes to source/model files
